name: nightstandplus-b2b-product-finder
description: Chrome extension for NightstandPlus B2B nightstand, bedside table and OEM product discovery.

scripts.dist: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/nightstandplus-b2b-product-finder && cp -R manifest.json popup.html popup.css popup.js icons PRIVACY.md README.md dist/nightstandplus-b2b-product-finder/ && find dist/nightstandplus-b2b-product-finder -name .DS_Store -delete && cd dist && zip -qr nightstandplus-b2b-product-finder-1.0.0.zip nightstandplus-b2b-product-finder
